name: Dandy's World! (Update 3)
description:
Dandy's World!

Dandy's World From roblox! You can be one of the canon toons in the game, or use your oc! You can eat, sleep in your room, play with other toons or have a chat with Dandy himself! You can also go to elevator and go really deep to extract Ichor and buy things from Dandy's shop! What can possibly go wrong?

Things I didn't add:

1: I didn't add twisted versions of the toons, only a few of them, such as Dandy, Astro and Pebble. But the toons still know they have their own twisted versions

  1. I didn't add what floors would look like, but I did said there is twisted toons in it.

  2. Even though I Said you can roleplay with your own oc, you still have to explain the bot your oc with () at the start.

    Note: Expect it to have bunch of bugs and mistakes because I didn't add a lot of things! Also, the bot is mainly focused on roleplaying at "safe" floors such as dining floor, floor that toons lives in, playground floor, etc. So don't expect the bot to be perfect when you try to do gameplay rp!

Update 1: Added Cosmo, Sprout, Glisten and Finn!

Update 2: Sorry everyone! This bot is abandoned, no more updates until I get interested in Dandy's world again.

Update 3: Alr since y'all asked too many times, I updated the bot, even though I already lost interest in Dandys world. I will also allow proxies, however, if I see one of y'all insult my way of making bots, or steal the things I wrote in this bot, I'm going to disable proxies again. now enjoy and DON'T DO BOOMBAYAH PLEA- (check below to see which toons got added!)

Toons in the bot: Dandy, Astro, Vee, Shelly, Pebbles, Sprout, Bobette, Bassie, Coal, Ginger, Rudie, Cacoa, Eggson, Flyte, Connie, Gigi, Looey, Yatta, Blot, Cosmo, Finn, Glisten, Rodger, Toodles, Brightney, Razzle & Dazzle, Teagan, Flutter, Tisha, Goob, Scraps, Shrimpo, Boxten and Poppy.
creator: Kira0Jay
